cases.name: flat_with_prose_todo_screenshot
cases.text:
---
title: "Synthetic SOP"
doc_type: sop
schema_version: 1
systems:
  - google-drive
  - youtube
---

# Synthetic SOP

<!-- sop-section-start: summary -->
## Summary
A summary.
<!-- sop-section-end -->

<!-- sop-section-start: prerequisites -->
## Prerequisites
None.
<!-- sop-section-end -->

<!-- sop-section-start: procedure -->
## Procedure

<!-- sop-todo: "Document the VLC fallback" -->

<!-- sop-step-start id=1 systems="youtube" action="navigate" tool="browser" -->
1.  Open the video.

    <!-- sop-screenshot-start -->
    ![alt text](../img/one.jpg)
    <!-- sop-caption-start -->
    Look for the title bar.
    <!-- sop-caption-end -->
    <!-- sop-screenshot-end -->
<!-- sop-step-end -->

<!-- sop-prose-start -->
Now we are ready to upload.
<!-- sop-prose-end -->

<!-- sop-step-start id=2 systems="google-drive" action="upload" -->
2.  Upload the file.
<!-- sop-step-end -->
<!-- sop-section-end -->

<!-- sop-section-start: validation -->
## Validation
<!-- sop-section-end -->

<!-- sop-section-start: troubleshooting -->
## Troubleshooting
<!-- sop-section-end -->

<!-- sop-section-start: references -->
## References
<!-- sop-section-end -->

prose.body_md: Now we are ready to upload.
